shapes.name: Pixel
shapes.description: A single pixel. The smallest building block.

shapes.name: Small Bar
shapes.description: A 2x1 horizontal bar.

shapes.name: Bar
shapes.description: A 3x1 horizontal bar. Good for hull planking.

shapes.name: Long Bar
shapes.description: A 4x1 horizontal bar. Structural backbone.

shapes.name: Small Square
shapes.description: A 2x2 square. Solid and reliable.

shapes.name: Small Rectangle
shapes.description: A 3x2 rectangle. Versatile hull section.

shapes.name: Small Triangle
shapes.description: A 2x2 right triangle. Sharp edges for aerodynamic profiles.

shapes.name: Medium Triangle
shapes.description: A 3x3 right triangle. The classic ship nose shape.

shapes.name: Nose Point
shapes.description: A 3x2 pointed bow. Gives your ship direction.

shapes.name: Medium Square
shapes.description: A solid 3x3 block. Foundation of any hull section.

shapes.name: Medium Rectangle
shapes.description: Wide and flat. Ideal for hull plating runs.

shapes.name: Large Square
shapes.description: Sixteen pixels of solid hull. A serious building block.

shapes.name: L-Shape
shapes.description: An angular bracket. Useful for corners and structural joints.

shapes.name: T-Shape
shapes.description: A T-junction. Where corridors meet and systems connect.

shapes.name: Plus
shapes.description: A crossroads of hull plating. Balanced coverage in all directions.

shapes.name: Large Triangle
shapes.description: A sweeping right triangle. Gives your ship a serious profile.

shapes.name: Diamond
shapes.description: A centered diamond. Compact and symmetrical.

shapes.name: Arrow Point
shapes.description: A sharp prow. Cuts through space like it means business.

shapes.name: Notch
shapes.description: A corner piece with one pixel removed. For fine detail work.

shapes.name: Hull Plank
shapes.description: A long hull section. Backbone of any serious ship.

shapes.name: Hull Section
shapes.description: A massive hull panel. For ships that take up real estate.

shapes.name: Swept Wing
shapes.description: An aerodynamic wing swept back at a sharp angle.
shapes.discovery_flavor: A wing fragment from something fast. The alloy is still warm.

shapes.name: Curved Bow
shapes.description: A graceful curved prow that parts the void ahead.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Schematics recovered from a ghost ship's nav computer.

shapes.name: Reinforced Bulkhead
shapes.description: Dense, solid, impenetrable. Extra thick hull plating.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Ore veins shaped like this don't occur naturally. Someone built down here.

shapes.name: Stealth Wedge
shapes.description: Angular surfaces that deflect sensor pings.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Angles designed to scatter sensor returns. Military-grade geometry.

shapes.name: Organic Panel
shapes.description: Organically shaped hull section with flowing curves.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Grown, not forged. The Collective's bio-hull prototype.

shapes.name: Thruster Nacelle
shapes.description: A long engine housing. Built for thrust.
shapes.discovery_flavor: A thruster housing with pre-cut mounting channels. Efficient.

shapes.name: Armored Prow
shapes.description: A massive reinforced bow. Rams through obstacles.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Dense enough to take a railgun slug. Whoever designed this meant business.

shapes.name: Cargo Rack
shapes.description: A skeletal frame for mounting cargo containers.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Modular container frame. Locks together like puzzle pieces.

shapes.name: Sensor Dome
shapes.description: A curved sensor housing. Precision-engineered.
shapes.discovery_flavor: A hemispherical housing. Everything it sees, you see.

shapes.name: Mega Block
shapes.description: For when subtlety isn't the point. Sixty-four pixels of hull.

shapes.name: Guild Prow
shapes.description: Clean lines and golden accents. Commerce Guild standard.

shapes.name: Union Girder
shapes.description: Riveted industrial steel. Miners' Union forge work.

shapes.name: Alliance Fin
shapes.description: Organic curves and frontier ingenuity.

shapes.name: Collective Arc
shapes.description: Precision-machined curves. Collective engineering.

shapes.name: Guild Stern
shapes.description: An elegant engine housing. Guild premium grade.

shapes.name: Union Plating
shapes.description: Thick interlocking plates forged in Union foundries.

shapes.name: Alliance Canopy
shapes.description: Bio-luminescent panels from the frontier's greenhouses.

shapes.name: Collective Ring
shapes.description: A circular sensor array housing. Perfect symmetry.

shapes.name: Pirate Cutlass Fin
shapes.description: An aggressive angled fin from a pirate warlord's ship.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Torn from the King's own hull. Still has scorch marks.

shapes.name: Corporate Bulwark
shapes.description: Thick corporate-grade armor plating.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Guild-stamped armor. Legal ownership is... complicated.

shapes.name: Forgeborn Plate
shapes.description: Industrial hull plating forged in impossible heat.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Metal from the Maw's heart. It doesn't bend.

shapes.name: Phantom Shroud
shapes.description: Stealth-profile plating that bends light.
shapes.discovery_flavor: The Phantom's cloak. Still shimmers at the edges.

shapes.name: Collector's Crest
shapes.description: An ornate frame piece. Surprisingly valuable.
shapes.discovery_flavor: They collected everything. Now you've collected them.

shapes.name: Void Chitin
shapes.description: Organic armor from a void creature. Unsettling.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Peeled from something that shouldn't exist.

shapes.name: AI Logic Core
shapes.description: A compact processing module. Warm to the touch.
shapes.discovery_flavor: It still hums. Don't think about it too hard.

shapes.name: Marcus's Masterwork
shapes.description: A structural masterpiece. Auto-repair channels built in.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Built by the best engineer in the Expanse.

shapes.name: Astrogation Module
shapes.description: A compact nav computer housing. Reduces fuel consumption.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Priya's custom navigation housing.

shapes.name: Medical Bay Module
shapes.description: A medical suite that keeps the crew fighting.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Elena's field hospital in a box.

shapes.name: Tomas's Getaway Kit
shapes.description: Stealth-profile emergency systems. For when things go wrong.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Tomas built this for one purpose: getting out fast.

shapes.name: Merchant's Keel
shapes.description: A cargo-optimized hull section. The trader's signature.
shapes.discovery_flavor: A keel designed for hauling profit across the stars.

shapes.name: Union Industrial Plate
shapes.description: Industrial-grade armor from a Union foundry floor.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Found in the restricted forge area. Still warm.

shapes.name: Collective Lab Panel
shapes.description: Experimental hull composite from a research facility.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Found in a sealed laboratory. What were they building?

shapes.name: Smuggler's Cache Plate
shapes.description: Lightweight stealth plating from the underworld.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Found in a smuggler's hidden workshop.

shapes.name: Ancient Mining Hull
shapes.description: Hull plating from a civilization long forgotten.
shapes.discovery_flavor: Found in an ancient mining ruin. Who built this?

shapes.name: Aurelia's Mark
shapes.description: A symbol of mastery. Faintly glows when placed.
shapes.discovery_flavor: For those who have seen everything the Expanse has to offer.
